race.comment: SPLIT THE GEE (3) may have just felt the pinch when out to 1400m last start, sitting handy and ending up 1.8L off the winner in this grade last time out. Back to this trip looks a good move and it looks to set up nicely for her from the draw with Fiore hopping on board. Can get back to winning ways. SNITZALATTE (1) got over the top to score in a photo finish over 1000m last start and looks ready for the rise in trip now. Carries the big weight, but her form coming in is strong and she can extend her winning streak without surprising. RIVA AQUARAMA (4) draws the inside which is some query with her pattern, though she's a nice filly on resumption. Her last trial was solid and Pike's booking is a good push for her chances. Can return with a forward showing. QUOKKA ROCKA (7) broke the maiden in good fashion last start and can repeat the dose.
